name: DOUGLAS DYNAMICS, INC
summary: Douglas Dynamics, Inc. is North America's premier manufacturer and upfitter of commercial work truck attachments and equipment. Operating for over 75 years, the company produces snowplows, sand and salt spreaders, municipal snow and ice control products, and truck upfitting services under brands including FISHER, SNOWEX, WESTERN, HENDERSON, DEJANA, VENCO, and VENTURO. Products are sold through approximately 3,000 distributor points of sale primarily to professional snowplowers, municipalities, and commercial fleet operators across the U.S. and Canada.
